missions.title: Plant Physiology - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering photosynthesis site, pigments, light reaction and more.

microtargets.title: Photosynthesis site
mustKnowFacts: Photosynthesis site is a fundamental subtopic of Plant Physiology.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Photosynthesis site for NEET.

diagrams.name: Diagram showing photosynthesis site
commonLabelTraps: Confusing Part A with Part B in photosynthesis site

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Photosynthesis site during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Photosynthesis site.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Photosynthesis site.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Photosynthesis site.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Photosynthesis site.
